descriptors.name: clone209_aoa_tag
descriptors.label: Bluetooth - SoC Clone209 AOA Tag
descriptors.description: Clone of U-Blox C209 Tag generating Connectionless AOA periodic advertisements compatible with C211 and ANT-B10-10C antenna array boards

properties.value: brd4182a brd4183a brd4183b brd4183c brd4184a brd4184b brd4310a brd4312a com.silabs.board.none
